switcher.title: Slide Switcher
switcher.openTitle: Open this slide in the active viewer
switcher.openCardHint: Click to open in the active viewer, or drag onto the viewer area — quick drop opens a new viewport, holding over a viewport replaces it
switcher.dropNewHint: Drop: open in new viewer (hold to replace)
switcher.focusCardHint: This slide is already open — click to focus its viewer
switcher.alreadyOpen: This slide is already open — its viewer was focused.
switcher.noConfig: Error: no configuration for this slide

demo.title: No Slide Loaded
demo.hint: Please select a slide from the Slide Manager. If not visible, slide manager can be opened via View menu.

info.title: Slide Information
info.noMetadata: No metadata available for this slide.
